calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Kate Kardos and Zeeva Kardos, property managers, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Kardos Properties LLC.
Jonathan Herschel Bornstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Kristen Maddas is present.
Michael Lyons and Gary Williams representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2011 Vallejo Street, #3, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of September 4, 2007 is vacated.
